metadata.name: sorcerer-startup
metadata.title: 🧙‍♂️ Welcome, Wise Sorcerer - Channel Your Power

story.introduction: ✨ Welcome, Master Sorcerer! Your deep knowledge and magical abilities grant you advanced powers over the system. Let's focus your arcane energies.
story.context: Sorcerers have advanced administration capabilities, system configuration access, and powerful automation tools.
story.purpose: Configure advanced system management and magical automation

variables.name: MAGICAL-SPECIALTY
variables.prompt: In which school of magic do you specialize?
variables.help: This determines your advanced tools and automation capabilities

variables.name: POWER-LEVEL
variables.prompt: How do you prefer to channel your magical power?
variables.help: Higher power levels enable more advanced features but require greater responsibility

variables.name: APPRENTICE-MENTORING
variables.prompt: Do you wish to mentor apprentices (lower roles)?
variables.help: This enables mentoring features and assistance capabilities
